song.title: Jesus Breaks Every Fetter
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) O how great His salvation! O how great His salvation! O how great His salvation! Jesus saves me now!
[C] Chorus Jesus breaks every fetter! Jesus breaks every fetter! Jesus breaks every fetter! Jesus sets me free!
[V2] 2) All my sins are forgiven! All my fetters are riven! I enjoy peace of heaven! Jesus saves me now!
[V3] 3) Neither sin nor temptation, Neither Satan’s vexation, Nor the world’s best elation Can enslave me now!
[V4] 4) I will sing Hallelujah! I will sing Hallelujah! I will sing Hallelujah! Jesus saves me now!
song.author: Janie West Metzgar
